taxonomyNotes: Overlapping categories both present: "Specialty Compounds" and "Specialty" — §III.15 (legacy — "treat as synonyms until a deliberate cleanup pass"). Each renders as a distinct UI category (lib/modes.ts categoriesFromIngredients is additive).

Overlapping categories both present: "Herbal Extracts" and "Botanicals" — §III.15 + §III.17 (overlapping botanical taxonomy). Each renders as a distinct UI category (lib/modes.ts categoriesFromIngredients is additive).

Overlapping categories both present: "Omega-3s" and "Fatty Acids" — §III.15 + §III.17 (overlapping lipid taxonomy). Each renders as a distinct UI category (lib/modes.ts categoriesFromIngredients is additive).

benchmarks.note: Field landed 2026-06-17 (efa54e1); population is the gated curation phase, never bulk.
Field present; population is the gated curation phase.
Field present; the tier-migration curation wave absorbs the legacy "Tier-A/B" name leaks.
Fields present; verified assignment is deliberate (Nate-gated for botanical USP-Latin), never bulk.

benchmarks.target: class-level flag (flag-not-certify); finished product COA-tested to USP <232>
benchmarks.note: 152 entries classifier-flagged (lib/heavyMetalVectors.ts); 0 COA-verified-clean, 0 explicit override. Flag, not certify.

findings.entryName: Iron Bisglycinate (Ferrochel — 18% Fe, PENDING SPEC VERIFICATION)
findings.issue: "PENDING" verification marker present — entry is amber-blocked for commercial use until drained.
findings.recommendation: Resolve the supplier-spec verification and drop the PENDING suffix, or route to the verification queue.

findings.issue: Pharmacopeial grade suffix on a compound with NO compendial monograph for the exact form — unsubstantiated grade claim (genuine 21 CFR truth-in-labeling defect).
findings.recommendation: Drop or re-grade the suffix — no monograph covers this exact compound (21 CFR truth-in-labeling).

findings.entryName: Spermidine Wheat Germ Extract (spermidineLIFE, Longevity Labs OY, Gluten-Free Certified, ~1% Spermidine)
findings.issue: Class-3 buyer-requirement claim in the display name (vegan/non-GMO/organic/etc.).

findings.issue: Pharmacopeial grade suffix not backed by a recorded monograph. A compendial monograph very likely EXISTS for this compound (common salt/vitamin) — this is a data-recording gap (populate pharmacopeialReference), not a truth-in-labeling defect. (Bench-test 2026-06-17: ~90% of grade-claim flags are this case.)
findings.recommendation: Record the compendial monograph in pharmacopeialReference to substantiate the grade claim.

findings.recommendation: If a true value+premium pair, leave; if a redundant rebrand, route to the consolidation queue.
